_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of translation processes and techniques.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of transformer architecture, attention mechanisms, and the pre-training and fine-tuning paradigm as it applies to language models.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-011 (AI, cosine: 0.450), DQ-K-008 (DQ, cosine: 0.403).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.485). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [processes, techniques, translation] vs WIDAI-only terms [applies, architecture, attention, fine, language, mechanisms] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.895 (P=0.922, R=0.870). P exceeds R by 0.052 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.5%). "Knowledge of translation processes and techniques." and "Knowledge of transformer architecture, attention mechanisms, and the pre-trainin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.488 ≈ STS 0.485 (gap 0.003). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [processes, techniques, translation]. WIDAI-only: [applies, architecture, attention, fine, language, mechanisms].
